items.title: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $317
items.description: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Motemaden   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $309 to $317.

items.title: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $305
items.description: JP Morgan  analyst Jimmy Bhullar   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $302 to $305.
